author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: dropout_f32/f64, dropout_philox_f32/f64. MSL kernel generates random mask using Philox-4x32-10 CBRNG (reproducible mask for gradient checkpointing). Matches PyTorch's MPS dropout implementation which uses Metal Performance Shaders random number generation.
